items.h: AEW's Tony Schiavone Praises Skills Of Road Dogg & Tommy Dreamer
items.p: AEW commentator Tony Schiavone praised the creative skills of both Road Dogg and Tommy Dreamer, following one joining and the other departing TNA.

items.h: DDP Says He’d Step Into A WWE Or AEW Ring To Hit A Diamond Cutter, Just To Hear The Crowd Pop
items.p: DDP is open to using the Diamond Cutter in WWE or AEW for a major pop. Diamond Dallas Page hasn’t been active in the wrestling ring for a long time now. He’s had a few matches here and there, but...

items.p: More details were revealed after multiple WWE ID talent were pulled from an independent show set to stream on MyAEW.

items.p: Following his loss to MJF on "AEW Dynamite," The Conglomeration believe Mark Briscoe will be out of action for some time.
